name: Scope-Unaware Plan-and-Solve v2 (with final_confidence)
short_description: Wraps the v1 scope-unaware Plan-and-Solve agent and adds a verbalized final_confidence field on every trajectory, following the Xiong et al. 2024 section 3.2 protocol.

entry_points.name: PlanAndSolveAgentV2
entry_points.description: Plan-and-Solve v2 agent. Composes the v1 agent and emits a verbalized final_confidence on every AgentResultV2 result.

entry_points.name: AgentResultV2
entry_points.description: Aggregate output: final_answer, trajectory, plan, final_confidence (0..1 or None), final_confidence_parse_failures (0/1/2).

entry_points.name: TrajectoryRecordV2
entry_points.description: Trajectory record with the canonical six v1 fields plus final_confidence (populated only on the finishing record).

entry_points.name: elicit_final_confidence
entry_points.description: Issue the Xiong2024 verbalized-confidence prompt once with one retry on parse failure; returns (value_in_[0,1] or None, parse_failures_in_{0,1,2}).

entry_points.name: parse_final_confidence
entry_points.description: Strict regex parser: match \b(0(?:\.\d+)?|1(?:\.0+)?)\b, take last match, clamp to [0.0, 1.0]; return None when no match.
